pet.title: Pet
pet.description: A pet available for adoption with detailed profiles and health records.

type.description: Type of pet (e.g. Dog, Cat, Rabbit).

age.description: Age of the pet (e.g. 2 years old, 3 months).

description.description: Description of the pet's personality and history.

imageUrl.description: URL or local asset URL of the pet's image.

health_log.title: HealthLog
health_log.description: A medical or daily health status log for a pet.

petId.description: The pet Id this log belongs to.

medicalNotes.description: Specific health status, medical records, or diet tracking details.

loggedBy.description: Name of the caretaker who recorded it.

match_inquiry.title: MatchInquiry
match_inquiry.description: An inquiry / questionnaire submitted by a potential adopter for matchmaking.

petId.description: Target pet ID. Optional if looking for general matches.

adopterPhone.description: Phone number of the prospective adopter.

workingHours.description: Working hours profile (e.g. Remote, 9-to-5, Frequent travel).

activityLevel.description: Active profile of adopter (e.g. High intensity jogging, Medium walks, Low sedentary).

message.description: Personal message about why they want to adopt.

aiScore.description: Gemini computed correlation score from 0 to 100.

aiFeedback.description: Gemini generated feedback mapping suitability and care instructions.

pets.description: Collection of all pets available or archived.

health_logs.description: Collection of health logs associated with pets.

match_inquiries.description: Collection of match inquiries and adopter applications.
